item.title: Conor Byrne Pub — Sunday Open Mic
item.description:
Sunday, March 22, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: 5140 Ballard Ave NW, Seattle

Weekly open mic at one of Seattle's most storied venues. Free to sign up, first come first served.

From Conor Byrne Pub — Sunday Open Mic

Event details

item.title: Nectar Lounge — Mo Jam Mondays
item.description:
Monday, March 23, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: 412 N 36th St, Seattle

Weekly music jam and open mic at Nectar Lounge.

From Nectar Lounge — Mo Jam Mondays

Event details

item.title: Skylark Cafe — Wednesday Open Mic
item.description:
Wednesday, March 25, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: 3803 Delridge Way SW, Seattle

Weekly open mic with full backline provided and 16-track recording available. Free sign-up.

From Skylark Cafe — Wednesday Open Mic

Event details

item.title: Club Comedy Seattle — Cheap Laughs Open Mic
item.description:
Wednesday, March 25, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Club Comedy Seattle, Downtown Seattle

Recurring Wednesday night open mic for comedians at Club Comedy Seattle.

From Club Comedy Seattle — Cheap Laughs Open Mic

Event details

item.title: Hopvine Pub — Wednesday Open Mic
item.description:
Wednesday, March 25, 2026 at 9 PM

Location: 507 15th Avenue E, Seattle

Casual singer/songwriter-focused open mic hosted by Eric Miller. All welcome.

From Hopvine Pub — Wednesday Open Mic

Event details

item.title: Couth Buzzard Books — Thursday Open Mic
item.description:
Thursday, March 26, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: 8310 Greenwood Ave N, Seattle

Acoustic, no-PA listening environment at an independent bookstore/café. All art forms welcome: music, poetry, dance, comedy, and stories.

From Couth Buzzard Books — Thursday Open Mic

Event details

item.title: Fremont Abbey Open Mic
item.description:
Tuesday, April 7, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: 4272 Fremont Ave N, Seattle

All art forms welcome at this community arts space. Twice-monthly open mic on the 1st and 3rd Tuesdays.

From Fremont Abbey Open Mic

Event details
